hero.title: Empowering Communities Through Education
hero.subtitle: Sinthanai Foundation is dedicated to building an intellectually wealthy society by bridging knowledge access gaps in disadvantaged communities.

about_section.title: The Centre for Expansion of the Mind
about_section.description: Initially established in Kotagala, a town in Sri Lanka's picturesque hill country, and have now moved to Panwila. Sinthanai Foundation operates at the grassroots level to deliver language, skills, and intellectual development programs. We believe every individual deserves access to quality education regardless of their background.
about_section.mission: Providing free education to eradicate the disparity in access to knowledge.
about_section.vision: To develop an intellectually wealthy society.

programs_section.title: Our Programmes
programs_section.subtitle: We offer diverse educational programs designed to equip individuals with the knowledge and skills they need to thrive.
programs_section.spoken_english_desc: Interactive English language classes for school leavers and community members preparing for higher education and employment.
programs_section.it_skills_desc: Computer literacy and digital skills training to prepare individuals for the modern workforce.
programs_section.philosophy_desc: Programs exploring philosophical thinking to develop intellectual capabilities and expand the mind.
programs_section.food_thought_desc: Programs focused on moral values, ethics, and character development for holistic growth.
programs_section.skype_english_desc: Global volunteer-led English classes connecting learners with teachers worldwide via online platforms.

cta.title: Together, We Can Make a Difference
cta.subtitle: Your support helps us continue our mission of empowering communities through education. Every contribution counts.

footer.description: A registered charity dedicated to empowering communities through education in Sri Lanka's hill country.
footer.newsletter_desc: Stay updated with our latest news and events.

about_page.hero_subtitle: Building an intellectually wealthy society since our founding.
about_page.story_title: From a Vision to a Movement
about_page.story_p1: The word Sinthanai derives from Tamil Language and means THINK in its verb form and THOUGHT in its noun form. Hence the name denotes the meaning "Foundation for Knowledge".
about_page.story_p2: Sinthanai Foundation is one man's vision of bridging the disparity in access to knowledge among the children who live in different parts of the world, and build an intellectually wealthy society of human beings.
about_page.story_p3: In order to achieve this vision, the close friends and families of this visionary joined hands and formed Sinthanai Foundation initially in the United Kingdom. Then Sinthanai Foundation was registered as a not-for-profit organisation in Sri Lanka and established its free education centre and continues to serve the underprivileged young adults in Sri Lanka.
about_page.story_aim: Expansion of the mind through access to knowledge. This aim is to be achieved by way of increasing the thinking ability of the participants by providing and facilitating access to knowledge which is currently deprived of them.
about_page.story_elaboration: To elaborate on what is said above, we all know life is full of choices. When someone makes a choice that choice then becomes the life of that person. This choice is made in every person's mind. So in order for a person to make a good choice and have a good life, he or she should have a clear mind, in other words clear positive thinking. And this thinking can only be achieved when the person concerned has a better knowledge of all aspects which happens around the world.
about_page.story_disparity: There are lots of organisations and individuals out there helping the unfortunate youngsters around the world. Whilst we greatly appreciate this, we regret to see that these help and projects are mainly restricted to providing the basic needs and basic education. Not many in our understanding help to nurture the youngsters to expand and grow their intellect.
about_page.story_comparison: If we take a child from the developed country and compare the knowledge of this child with a same aged child from the third world country, we can see a vast disparity in advancement in the knowledge between them. The children from advanced nations tend to be more intellectually mature and broad minded as opposed to a child from a less advanced nation. This is extremely unfortunate. We believe that all children should have access to all the materials which would bring such knowledge to expand their horizons.
about_page.story_intention: Therefore with our projects we intend to educate the youngsters by providing them knowledge and facilitate access to knowledge with guidance to enrich their intellectual capacity.
about_page.story_science: In today's world, science has spread its wings to all corners of the universe conducting experiments and coming out with lots of findings. And these findings are made public knowledge through the media. If we take wild life, astronomy, philosophy, medical or any other scientific programs telecasted on TV of the developed world, we can find an ocean full of information and specialised knowledge. Unfortunately this information is not available to a child growing up in the third world country; especially to those who are under privileged.
about_page.story_dedication: Hence we have decided to dedicate our time to those youngsters to provide them with information and specialised knowledge which they are currently deprived of. We believe that by devoting our time to these youngsters we will be able to assist in improving a neglected and impoverished society of people and contribute to the advancement of the society as a whole.
about_page.value_inclusion_desc: We operate without discrimination based on race, religion, or gender, ensuring equal access to education for all.
about_page.value_excellence_desc: We maintain the highest standards in our educational programs, partnering with recognized institutions.
about_page.value_community_desc: We believe in the power of community-driven development and grassroots engagement.
about_page.value_innovation_desc: We embrace modern technology and methods to make education accessible and engaging.

programs_page.hero_subtitle: Comprehensive educational programs designed to empower and uplift communities.
programs_page.spoken_english_detail: Our Spoken English program provides interactive language classes for school leavers and community members. Students develop conversational skills, grammar foundations, and confidence in English communication, preparing them for higher education and employment opportunities.
programs_page.it_detail: Digital literacy training covering computer fundamentals, internet skills, office applications, and basic programming. Equips participants with essential skills for the modern workforce.
programs_page.philosophy_detail: Explore philosophical thinking through guided discussions, readings, and contemplation. Programs celebrate International Philosophy Day annually and develop critical thinking capabilities.
programs_page.philosophy_schedule: Weekly sessions, Special events on Philosophy Day
programs_page.food_thought_detail: A holistic wellness program combining nutrition education with intellectual development. Participants learn about healthy eating, mindfulness, and the connection between physical and mental well-being.
programs_page.food_thought_eligibility: Families and individuals in the community
programs_page.online_english_detail: Global volunteer-led English classes connecting Sri Lankan learners with teachers worldwide via online platforms. An innovative approach to language learning that builds cross-cultural understanding.

gallery_page.hero_subtitle: Capturing moments of learning, growth, and celebration.

events_page.hero_subtitle: Discover our upcoming events and relive past celebrations.

donate_page.hero_subtitle: Your generosity helps us continue empowering communities through education.
donate_page.impact_25: Provides learning materials for one student for a term
donate_page.impact_50: Funds a month of English classes for a group of 10
donate_page.impact_100: Supports a full scholarship for one student
donate_page.impact_250: Equips a computer lab for digital skills training
donate_page.gift_aid_desc: If you are a UK taxpayer, Gift Aid increases your donation by 25% at no extra cost to you. We can reclaim the tax you've already paid on your donation.

volunteer_page.hero_subtitle: Join our global community of volunteers making a real difference in education.
volunteer_page.letter_intro: At Sinthanai Foundation we have included Spoken English as part of our intellectual development programmes conducted at our Free Education Centre. Apart from classroom training in Spoken English, we have designed an interactive session for the students using social media.
volunteer_page.letter_purpose: This will provide the students an opportunity to speak in English which is deprived of them currently due to non-exposure to the English-speaking world. In order for us to run this session we are setting up a panel of participants from around the world who are willing to spend some time on a voluntary basis.
volunteer_page.letter_privacy: Considering the private life of each individual who would be participating in this programme we have decided to run this session only once a week. Each session will last for about an hour to hour and half.
volunteer_page.letter_platform: As explained above, currently we use Google Meet as the platform for this exercise. Please note that we intend to make these sessions as video call sessions, however the volunteers may choose not to use the videos if they prefer for privacy reasons.
volunteer_page.letter_benefit: The above programme will not only help the under privileged beneficiaries, but also provides a platform to those who are with a heart to reach out to the others but restricted due to various commitments. Therefore, we believe that many of you will find this as an attractive opportunity to help others and if so we kindly request you to sign up for this programme.
volunteer_page.signup_instruction: Please send us the following information by way of an email to
volunteer_page.signup_response: And we will revert to you with further details.
